name_en: M81404 Blue Flower Embossed Silk Print This Slender wallet releases the vibrant power of Summer 2022. Delicate Taurillon leather embosses the traditional Monogram pattern, dyed in signature colors under designer Virgil Abloh. The slim configuration holds personal essentials and fits into handbags or pockets. Dimensions: 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm
